gempyor.model_info¶

This module contains abstractions for interacting with the model as a monolithic object. Namely it contains the ModelInfo class.

Classes

ModelInfo(config, nslots, write_csv, write_parquet, first_sim_index, stoch_traj_flag, seir_modifiers_scenario, outcome_modifiers_scenario, setup_name, path_prefix, in_run_id, out_run_id, in_prefix, out_prefix, inference_filename_prefix, inference_filepath_suffix, config_filepath)

Parses and validates config details, holds model information, and manges file input/output. config is the only non-optional parameter.

Public Methods of ModelInfo:

.get_seeding_data(sim_id: int)

Returns a tuple containing the seeding data dictionary and seeding data array.

gempyor
